name: Magic Pan Orange Almond Salad
recipeInstructions:
Dressing:
1. Sugar
2. 1/2 tsp tarragon (dried)
3. 1/3 cup oil (vegetable)
4. Salt and pepper
5. 1/8 tsp Tabasco sauce
6. Egg yolk
1. Shaking constantly, toast almonds in a skillet over low heat until golden brown (about 5 minutes).
2. Wash and dry lettuce. Tear into bite-sized pieces.
3. Place the toasted almonds, green onions, and mandarin oranges with torn lettuce in a large salad bowl.
4. For the dressing, combine all ingredients except egg and vinegar. Add the egg yolk in thin streams and process until well blended.
5. Toss well just before serving.
6. Leftover dressing keeps up to 1 week in the refrigerator.
